title: Spoke selector pattern: toggle chips grouped by Evaluated / Available
summary: Replace multi-select with toggle chip buttons. Group by evaluation status: Evaluated (fleet entry has .latest data) shown first, Available (never scanned) second. Pre-select active spoke. renderSpokeToggles(fleet, preselect) + getSelectedSpokes() are canonical functions.
why_it_matters: Toggle chips make add and remove symmetrical. Evaluated/Available grouping surfaces the most actionable spokes first.
